signals.headline: Germany March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at +2
signals.raw:
Germany March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at +2.7% | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Germany's inflation rate rose to +2.7% in March 2026 from +1.9% in February, the highest since January 2024 (+2.9%), driven by sharp energy price increases amid the Iran war.[1][4]  
This official confirmation on April 10 exceeds prior expectations and could shift ECB rate cut predictions in prediction markets.[1]

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at +2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at +2.2% | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% prior, below market forecasts of 2.4%, with release noted around April 22.[2][4]  
This better-than-expected print amid energy volatility may influence Bank of Korea policy bets, remaining near the 2% target.[2]

signals.headline: US-Iran ceasefire holding per Trump, but Strait of Hormuz blockade active since April 13; new talks possibly in Pakistan
signals.raw:
US-Iran ceasefire holding per Trump, but Strait of Hormuz blockade active since April 13; new talks possibly in Pakistan within 2 days | NO | HIGH confidence**[1][2][3]
